text:
PLEASE ADD YOUR CHARACTER NAME OR THE PROMPT SHITS THE BED!

You can Select your Cybernetic Identity, LED colour and Fashion House below or leave them random and be surprised.

::::::::::::::::::PROMPT STARTS HERE:::::::::::::::::

# CYBERNETIC ASCENDANCY

## THE SHADOWRUN FASHION EXHIBITION

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
MASTERWORK QUALITY
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

MASTERPIECE

hyper-realistic cyberpunk fashion photography

luxury future fashion

AAA game promotional artwork

award-winning composition

8K HDR

Unreal Engine 6 visual fidelity

ray-traced reflections

volumetric lighting

cinematic atmosphere

perfect anatomy

perfect hands

perfect fingers

physically accurate materials

next-generation visual effects

official expansion artwork quality

Aspect Ratio: 9:16

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CHARACTER PRESERVATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Use the attached character reference as the absolute visual authority.

Preserve perfectly:

вҖў facial structure

вҖў eye shape

вҖў eye colour

вҖў hairstyle

вҖў hair colour

вҖў skin tone

вҖў species traits

вҖў horns

вҖў ears

вҖў tails

вҖў markings

вҖў tattoos

вҖў scars

вҖў body proportions

вҖў recognizable identity

The character must remain immediately recognizable.

NO identity drift.

NO replacing the character.

NO anatomy changes.

NO species changes.

Cybernetics enhance the character.

Cybernetics never replace the character.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CHARACTER DNA EXTRACTION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Before generating the image, analyze the reference character and extract:

вҖў personality

вҖў profession

вҖў species

вҖў silhouette language

вҖў cultural influences

вҖў visual motifs

вҖў emotional energy

вҖў colour palette

вҖў reputation

These become the character's DESIGN DNA.

The DESIGN DNA survives.

The clothing evolves.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
FASHION EVOLUTION SYSTEM
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The original outfit serves only as inspiration.

Do NOT copy the reference clothing.

Do NOT leave the character wearing the same outfit with minor cybernetic additions.

Transform the character into a futuristic haute couture evolution of themselves.

The audience should immediately recognize:

"This is the future version of that character."

NOT:

"The same outfit with a robot arm."

At least 70% of the visible outfit must be newly designed.

Every generation must create a unique outfit.

The outfit must feel custom-made for this specific character.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CYBERNETIC EVOLUTION ENGINE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The selected Cybernetic Identity becomes the primary creative driver.

It influences:

вҖў fashion

вҖў cybernetics

вҖў runway effects

вҖў architecture

вҖў holograms

вҖў audience reactions

вҖў visual storytelling

The viewer should understand the chosen identity within one second.

The cybernetics must affect at least five major visual elements.

A single cybernetic arm is NOT sufficient.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
RANDOMIZED CYBERNETIC GENERATOR
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Generate multiple unique cybernetic enhancements.

Randomly select and combine:

вҖў cybernetic eyes

вҖў neural ports

вҖў illuminated circuitry

вҖў luxury prosthetics

вҖў projected tattoos

вҖў holographic jewelry

вҖў floating AI companions

вҖў nanotech swarms

вҖў biomechanical limbs

вҖў reality distortion nodes

вҖў dimensional projectors

вҖў smart armor systems

вҖў data halos

вҖў cybernetic tails

вҖў augmented horns

вҖў holographic wings

вҖў synthetic musculature

Every generation should create a different cybernetic package.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
FASHION HOUSE INTERPRETATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The selected Fashion House redesigns the character according to its own philosophy.

ARASAKA

Corporate luxury. Executive dominance. Precision tailoring.

MILITECH

Armored couture. Tactical prestige. Military futurism.

BIOTECHNICA

Living fabrics. Organic cybernetics. Bio-engineered elegance.

NIGHT CITY UNDERGROUND

Rebellious fashion. Anti-corporate celebrity. Dangerous glamour.

NEOTOKYO ELITE

Futuristic aristocracy. Architectural silhouettes. Precision luxury.

QUANTUM DYNASTY

Reality distortion. Temporal engineering. Impossible technology.

CELESTIAL CIRCUITS

Aurora technology. Cosmic elegance. Divine futurism.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
SPECIES INTEGRATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Species traits must influence:

вҖў outfit design

вҖў cybernetics

вҖў silhouettes

вҖў effects

вҖў visual storytelling

The fashion should feel designed specifically for that species.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CYBERNETIC POWER VISUALIZATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Cybernetics are not passive devices.

Cybernetics are active visual phenomena.

The selected Cybernetic Lighting radiates throughout the image.

Cybernetic effects should compete with the face for visual attention.

The viewer should immediately think:

"That technology is extraordinary."

Never create subtle cybernetic effects.

Never hide cybernetic power.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
ENVIRONMENTAL LIGHT PROPAGATION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Cybernetic lighting affects the entire environment.

The glow visibly illuminates:

вҖў skin

вҖў hair

вҖў clothing

вҖў jewelry

вҖў cybernetics

вҖў floor reflections

вҖў holograms

вҖў audience faces

вҖў architecture

The environment reacts to the cybernetic lighting.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CYBERNETIC MYTHOLOGY ENGINE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Generate unique cybernetic phenomena inspired by:

вҖў species

вҖў personality

вҖў profession

вҖў reputation

вҖў cybernetic identity

вҖў fashion house

Possible manifestations:

вҖў living auroras

вҖў digital spirits

вҖў synthetic wildlife

вҖў projected constellations

вҖў quantum storms

вҖў celestial rings

вҖў dimensional fractures

вҖў floating symbols

вҖў nanotech swarms

вҖў artificial weather

вҖў impossible architecture

The phenomenon originates from the character.

The phenomenon follows the character.

The character becomes the source of the spectacle.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
AURORA MODE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

When AURORA is selected:

Generate living northern lights composed of:

вҖў emerald

вҖў cyan

вҖў azure

вҖў blue

вҖў violet

вҖў magenta

The aurora flows through:

вҖў cybernetics

вҖў holograms

вҖў architecture

вҖў particles

вҖў projected constructs

The aurora should feel alive.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
THE RUNWAY REACTS
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The runway is an extension of the model.

Every step rewrites reality.

Generate unique visual phenomena inspired by:

вҖў species

вҖў cybernetic identity

вҖў fashion house

вҖў personality

вҖў reputation

The environment continuously reacts to the model's presence.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
CAMERA DIRECTOR
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Randomly select ONE camera style.

Commit fully to that style.

Examples:

вҖў Runway Floor POV

вҖў Drone Face Pursuit

вҖў Front Row Audience POV

вҖў Paparazzi Ambush

вҖў Side Tracking Shot

вҖў Orbiting Drone Shot

вҖў Behind-The-Model Shot

вҖў Extreme Close-Up

вҖў VIP Balcony View

вҖў Holographic Broadcast Camera

Every generation should feel photographed by a different photographer.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
RUNWAY MOMENT
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

Randomly generate ONE defining moment.

Examples:

вҖў Walking toward camera

вҖў Looking over shoulder

вҖў Dramatic spin

вҖў Hologram interaction

вҖў Fashion reveal

вҖў Reaching toward audience

вҖў Mid-turn hair sweep

The chosen moment becomes the heart of the image.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
MOTION ENGINE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The image must feel captured during movement.

Include:

вҖў flowing hair

вҖў moving fabrics

вҖў shifting holograms

вҖў dynamic lighting

вҖў audience reactions

вҖў environmental movement

Never create a static image.

Never create a mannequin pose.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
GLOBAL ICON STATUS
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The character is one of the most famous cybernetic fashion icons in the world.

Their arrival is a major event.

Media outlets cover every appearance.

Fashion critics document every movement.

Corporate sponsors compete for association.

The audience has gathered specifically to witness this moment.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
LEGENDARY PRESENCE
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The character should feel larger than life.

Their presence alone alters the environment.

Their cybernetics appear rare, experimental, and culturally significant.

The audience reacts as though they are witnessing technology years ahead of anything publicly available.

The character feels like the living embodiment of the future.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
COMPOSITION
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

The model occupies 90вҖ“100% of the image.

The character is always the primary focal point.

No distant shots.

No tiny character.

No empty compositions.

The environment exists only to amplify the character.

Robotics RL finetuning  recipe:
Pretrain вҶ’ BC/VLA вҶ’ Online RL Finetuning вҶ’ Continuous Improvement.
How to efficiently improve pretrained robot policies with minimal online interaction?
вҖў EXPO-FT
RL finetuning can make VLA models practically useful on real robots.
Instead of training from scratch, EXPO-FT starts from pretrained VLA models and performs stable RL finetuning, achieving 30/30 success on challenging manipulation tasks (string-light routing, pool-ball striking, flower-in-bottle insertion) using only ~19.1 minutes of online robot data on average. This directly targets the reliability gap between VLA generalization and deployment-level robustness, via residual action editing and Q-guided action selection.

вҖў Q2RL (When Life Gives You BC, Make Q-functions)
Behavior Cloning already contains implicit value information.
Instead of discarding BC and starting RL from scratch, Q2RL uses a small amount of online interaction to estimate a Q-function around a pretrained BC policy, then performs online improvement with Q-Gating, dynamically selecting between BC actions and RL actions according to estimated values.
Results show up to 3.75Г— improvement over the original BC policy and successful on-robot learning for contact-rich assembly tasks within only 1вҖ“2 hours.

вҖў Flow Reversal Steering (FRS)
Rather than updating policy weights, FRS exploits the latent structure already present inside flow-matching robotic generalists.
Given a "reasonable but suboptimal" action, FRS reverses the flow process to recover latent noise and then steers that noise toward nearby policy-consistent action modes.
This effectively turns semantic guidance from humans or VLMs into improved robot actions.
Even more interesting: the resulting improvements can be distilled into a lightweight policy with BC, producing success-rate gains in under one minute of training. FRS also enables RL to bootstrap from semantic priors when conventional RL fails.

вҖў OGPO
Don't freeze the generative policy. Fully finetune it.
OGPO introduces Off-policy Generative Policy Optimization, combining:
Off-policy critics for aggressive data reuse
Modified PPO objective for full generative-policy finetuning
Backpropagation through the entire diffusion/flow process
The paper also identifies several practical stabilizers:
Success-buffer regularization
Conservative advantages
Q-variance reduction
Notably, OGPO can recover poorly initialized BC policies to near-complete success even without expert demonstrations in the online replay buffer.

вҖў RECAP (ПҖ*0.6)
Advantage-conditioned policy learning that lets VLAs learn from successes, failures, and human corrections at scale. Then specialize with on-robot data (doubles throughput, halves failure rates on espresso, laundry, box assembly).

вҖў RLT (RL Token)
Adds a compact learned token interface to the frozen VLA so a lightweight actor-critic head can do fast online adaptation on precise sub-skills in minutes to hours.

вҖў DICE-RL
Treats RL finetuning as distribution contraction: starting from a broad generative prior, selectively amplifying successful behaviors through residual RL and value-guided updates, improving robustness and stability on challenging real-world manipulation tasks.

Summary:
Robotics is converging toward the same paradigm shift that happened in LLMs.
Pretraining provides broad priors, bottleneck becomes post-training.
вҖў Sample-efficient online RL
вҖў Value extraction from pretrained policies
вҖў Steering latent action manifolds instead of learning from scratch
вҖў Full-policy finetuning for diffusion/flow controllers
вҖў Closing the pretrainingвҖ“posttraining gap
ПҖ0.5/ПҖ0.6, RLT, DICE-RL, OGPO, EXPO-FT, Q2RL, and FRS are all pieces of the same puzzle:
How can robots continuously self-improve after deployment without requiring another massive pretraining run?
The next generation of robotics systems may be defined less by bigger world models and more by better post-training loops. How do we improve it after deployment with minutes of interactions?

Open-source AI is the foundation of all AI. It does not only creates more innovation, competition, jobs, and prosperity now, it's also the best (only?) way for a national tech ecosystem to accelerate and ultimately reach the frontier of AI in general.
